default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance, address execution issues, and align on 2026 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance Gap:** January has only 1 demo lead (vs. a 20-lead/mo goal), creating a significant ROI challenge for a proposed $12k/mo budget increase.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [**Execution Issues:** Content quality and speed have declined. GrowthX will implement new systems to fix missed checklist items (e.g., CTAs, schema) and accelerate the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift:** GrowthX will focus on proactive strategy (e.g., optimizing evaluation-stage content) to drive conversions, shifting from a reactive model.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [**New Product Launch:** Yourco launched "Frontline Intelligence," an AI tool for analyzing internal communication data. This creates a powerful new content asset.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)

## Topics

### Performance & ROI Challenge

  - [**January Performance:** 1 demo lead, far below the 20-lead/mo target.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [**2025 Baseline:** Averaged \~9 leads/mo with an ARPU of \~$500.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [**Budget Proposal:** A $12k/mo increase was proposed to scale content production.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [**ROI Justification:** The current performance makes the budget increase difficult to justify. The channel must demonstrate consistent lead generation before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

### Execution & Process Issues

  - [**Content Quality:** Basic checklist items are being missed (e.g., CTAs above fold, Q\&A schema, working links).](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
      - [**Cause:** GrowthX team's unfamiliarity with Prismic and a lapse in the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
      - [**Fix:** Carrie will personally audit all content this week and implement new systems for the team.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [**Content Speed:** The pipeline has slowed, delaying content for review.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
      - [**Impact:** This directly contributes to the low lead volume.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [**Pending Items:** Several follow-ups are overdue, including:](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
      - [Access to the "pro" version of a tool and workshop recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
      - [The combined LLM/UDEX gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
      - [Interlinking supporting articles to their pillar pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Technical Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [**Indexing:** A persistent indexing issue for one page was escalated to GrowthX's technical director team for a fresh review.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [**Adobe AI Optimizer:** A potential bot-readability issue was investigated and confirmed to be a false alarm.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)

### AI Mentions & Strategic Direction

  - [**Positive AI Mentions:** Yourco is gaining visibility in Google AI Overviews and Claude for high-intent, evaluation-stage prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [**Example 1:** Cited first for "top SMS-based communication platforms."](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - **Example 2:** Ranked \#10 for "best apps for employee communication," appearing alongside major brands like Slack and Microsoft Teams.
  - [**Discrepancy in Reporting:** GrowthX's platform shows higher citation rates than third-party tools (e.g., SEMrush).](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
      - [**Reason:** GrowthX's platform tracks a larger, more strategically targeted set of evaluation-level prompts, which are designed to capture users with higher purchase intent.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift:** GrowthX is moving to a more proactive, strategic role to drive conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [**Focus:** Optimizing evaluation-stage content and refreshing performant pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Carrie's new role as Engagement Manager provides more time for strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

### New Product: Frontline Intelligence

  - [**Launch:** Yourco launched "Frontline Intelligence," an AI tool for analyzing internal communication data, yesterday.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [**Functionality:** Customers can ask natural language questions (e.g., "Compare message volume Dec vs. Nov") and receive instant, data-driven answers with citations.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [**Content Opportunity:** This product is a powerful new asset for content marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
      - [**Action:** Create a CTA using a common use case (e.g., "What are the top issues discussed by employees?") with a visual of the tool's interface.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
      - [Audit all content this week for checklist compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
      - [Implement new systems to accelerate the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [Follow up on all pending items (tool access, gap analysis, interlinking).](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
      - [Provide a strategic plan to justify the budget increase, focusing on ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
      - [Rework the content calendar to prioritize evaluation-stage content and page refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
      - [Share the HubSpot dashboard for accurate lead tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
      - [Provide a list of common use cases for Frontline Intelligence.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
      - [Coordinate with the design team to create graphics of the Frontline Intelligence interface for content.](https://fathom.video/share/Kuzwu1abYfwzKV1sXp_sCQx2atbsoQFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)
